message:
bench(fcp-host): add local_invoke criterion benchmark (br-4jy4v)

Companion to benches/cold_start.rs (commit c0d4c48b). cold_start measures
the one-shot cost of spawning fcp-host until a connector reports healthy;
local_invoke measures the steady-state /rpc/invoke HTTP roundtrip cost
AFTER the connector is already activated, so regressions in the hot path
(preflight, capability verify, subprocess invoke, response serialization)
surface independently of the activation cost.

Pattern: spawn fcp-host once per Criterion benchmark group, generate a
fresh Ed25519 key, write a permissive ZonePolicyObject for ZoneId::work()
to FCP_HOST_ZONE_POLICIES_FILE, hand the public key to fcp-host via
FCP_HOST_CAPABILITY_PUBLIC_KEY, and wait for fcp-test-connector to report
healthy. In the measured loop, build a fresh InvokeRequest (new RequestId
per iteration; capability_token is reused since it is unbound to the
request id), POST to /rpc/invoke over a short-lived TCP connection, and
assert HTTP/1.1 200 to detect functional regressions.

Verified end-to-end: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fcp-host --bench
local_invoke -- --quick reports ~44 ms invoke roundtrip on dev hardware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -65,3 +65,7 @@ criterion.workspace = true
 [[bench]]
 name = "cold_start"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "local_invoke"
+harness = false
